mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (post_id, user_id, content, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.content, u.nickname, CASE WHEN c.user_id = #{currentUserId} THEN true ELSE false END AS written_by_me, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM comments WHERE id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
